summary: The diff modifies 6 files: Navbar.tsx, AboutSection.tsx, Footer.tsx, PlayerCard.tsx, frontend-file-summaries.txt, and project_state.json. All component updates reference the raw uploaded file path '/assets/quality_restoration_20260128182709920-4.jpg' directly instead of the generated asset paths specified in the requirements. The actual image asset files (profile-avatar.dim_512x512.png, pwa-icon.dim_192x192.png, pwa-icon.dim_512x512.png) do not appear to have been added or replaced in the diff. No changes to index.html or manifest are visible in the diff to confirm PWA icon updates.
